description: Molinos Rio de la Plata S.A. engages in the industrialization and commercialization of food and alcoholic beverages in Argentina and internationally. It operates through Foods and Wineries segments. The company offers edible oils, pasta, dried, frozen, fractionated flour, grass, rice, wines, and sparkling wines. Molinos Rio de la Plata S.A. was incorporated in 1931 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
